title: senecio inornatus
intro: Senecio inornatus, also known as the Rough Groundsel, is a plant species within the daisy family (Asteraceae) and is native to Australia. Traditionally, the leaves and flowers of Senecio inornatus have been used in herbal medicine to treat various ailments, particularly those related to the respiratory and digestive systems. The plant is believed to possess anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of conditions such as bronchitis, asthma, and gastrointestinal issues. Senecio inornatus can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity.
